name: German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until their skins are tender. Cool, peel, and slice about 1/4-inch thick.
2. In a large bowl, layer the potato slices with diced onion; set aside at room temperature.
3. Fry bacon until brown. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels. Pour off all but 1/4 cup of fat.
4. Over medium heat, add flour to the bacon drippings, stirring to prevent lumps. Gradually add vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and pepper to the roux, stirring constantly until a smooth sauce forms. Remove from heat; stir in the cooked bacon.
5. Pour the sauce over the room temperature potatoes; gently toss to coat all potatoes.
6. Serve warm.
